---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation, enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Documentation Improvement

### Documentation Type

- [ ] **README**: Project overview and getting started
- [ ] **API Documentation**: API reference and examples
- [ ] **Tutorial**: Step-by-step learning guides
- [ ] **How-To Guide**: Task-oriented instructions
- [ ] **Architecture**: System design and decisions
- [ ] **Contributing Guide**: Contribution instructions
- [ ] **Changelog**: Version history and changes
- [ ] **Other**: Please specify

### Repository/Location

- **Repository**: [Which repository?]
- **File**: [Specific file, if applicable]
- **URL**: [Link to documentation, if applicable]

### Issue Type

- [ ] **Missing Documentation**: Documentation doesn't exist
- [ ] **Outdated Information**: Documentation is outdated
- [ ] **Incorrect Information**: Documentation is wrong
- [ ] **Unclear Explanation**: Documentation is confusing
- [ ] **Missing Examples**: No examples provided
- [ ] **Formatting Issue**: Documentation formatting problems
- [ ] **Other**: Please describe

### Describe the Improvement

A clear and concise description of the documentation improvement you suggest.

### Current Documentation

What does the current documentation say (or what is missing)?

### Proposed Improvement

What should the documentation say instead?

### Target Audience

Who is this documentation for?

- [ ] **New Users**: First-time users of the project
- [ ] **Developers**: Software developers
- [ ] **Contributors**: People contributing to the project
- [ ] **Maintainers**: Project maintainers
- [ ] **Students**: Educational content consumers
- [ ] **Teachers**: Educational content creators
- [ ] **Other**: Please specify

### Examples

If applicable, provide examples of what the improved documentation should look like.

```markdown
# Example documentation structure

## Section 1

Content...

## Section 2

Content...
```

### Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation improvement here.

---

**By submitting this documentation improvement, I confirm that:**

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided all the required information
- [ ] I understand this is a public repository and my information will be visible
- [ ] I am willing to help implement the documentation improvement if needed
